headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Colgate-Palmolive, Raises Price Target to $95
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $92 to $95.
